description_long: This modern two-story house features a flat roof with solar panels, expansive terraces, and a mix of open and enclosed living spaces. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is surrounded by manicured lawns, several mature trees, and decorative shrubs, enhancing its curb appeal. Outdoor amenities include a rooftop lounge area, a ground-level patio, and a driveway leading to a carport. The house incorporates clean lines, minimalistic railings, and a prominent staircase on one side, emphasizing its modern architectural style. The main entrance is accentuated by a small porch and is easily accessible from the adjacent sidewalk.
description: A modern, flat-roofed two-story house with large windows, solar panels, and landscaped surroundings. Features include a rooftop terrace, carport, and a prominent exterior staircase.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, rooftop terrace, solar panels, and landscaped yard with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the exterior staircase, upper-level balcony, and additional greenery along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, solar panels, and a more private section of the yard with fewer windows.
description_view_3: Street-side view with the driveway, carport, and a clear look at the main entrance and front landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and some vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, single modern door, minimal steps, and landscaped approach
